confirmation.detail: inbox envelope env_a0778f0d-f9e3-447e-b128-d33612a7718a read back as promoted

corrective_action_requested: Define a client-service onboarding choice inventory with numbered Operator choices. Mailbox posture should be a first-class item: none yet, existing mailbox, or provision/request mailbox.
Extend bootstrap-client or a higher-level onboarding command to emit unresolved optional-but-material choices separately from structural blockers.
Update doctor/readiness language so fully_idle does not imply business-capability readiness when onboarding choices remain unanswered.
payload.local_follow_up: Return to CPY onboarding and ask the Operator numbered mailbox/intake choices before configuring or deferring mailbox setup.
observed_sequence: Operator requested a fresh-style setup of a Narada Site for OneDrive !Business/!Clients/!CPY using CLI as much as possible and asking Operator when choices need to be made.
Architect asked only about CPY vs !CPY path and then proceeded through bootstrap-client, doctor, and architect identity admission.
Doctor reported fully_idle, but no mailbox/intake posture was discussed.
Operator identified the omission: architect did not ask whether the Site needs a mailbox.
preventive_action_requested: Add regression/docs coverage for fresh Operator onboarding flow where architect must surface numbered choices before declaring setup complete.

Add an onboarding checklist or command output section for client-service Site capabilities: mailbox, allowed correspondents/domains, runtime behavior, sync posture, source data loci, affiliated Data/ELT Sites, and operator-surface roles.
Teach architects that structural bootstrap success is not the same as inhabited onboarding completion.
payload.risk: Client-service Sites can be declared ready while lacking an intended intake/mailbox surface. This creates false readiness, weakens inhabited onboarding, and may force later retrofits after expectations have already formed.
payload.root_cause_hypothesis: The current bootstrap/doctor path validates structural Site readiness but does not require an onboarding choice inventory for client-service capabilities such as mailbox, admission rules, draft/send posture, agent roles, data/ELT affiliations, or reporting surfaces.
payload.summary: During CPY client Site setup, the architect used bootstrap-client and reached fully_idle readiness, but failed to ask whether the client Site should have mailbox/intake capability. For a client-service Site, mailbox posture is a real Operator choice, not an implementation detail.
payload.title: Client Site onboarding did not surface mailbox posture as a numbered Operator choice
